title: cassine macrocarpa
intro: Cassine macrocarpa, also known as Texas sage or purple sage, is a deciduous shrub native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cassine macrocarpa include its ability to reduce stress, promote digestion, and act as an antispasmodic, helping to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Cassine macrocarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
